mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.login_type AS "loginType", a.has_invit AS "hasInvit", a.show_fx AS "showFx", a.show_xcx AS "showXcx", a.open_bj AS "openBj", a.open_ch AS "openCh", a.open_mibao AS "openMibao", a.sname AS "sname", a.sno AS "sno", a.skm AS "skm", a.hongbao AS "hongbao", a.zhuanzhang AS "zhuanzhang", a.tx1 AS "tx1", a.tx2 AS "tx2", a.tx3 AS "tx3", a.cz AS "cz", a.czimg AS "czimg", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.openhb AS "openhb", a.openzz AS "openzz", a.tonghua AS "tonghua", a.sendadd AS "sendadd", a.showkf AS "showkf", a.kfurl AS "kfurl", a.namemgc AS "namemgc", a.showonline AS "showonline", a.showyidu AS "showyidu", a.showsign AS "showsign", a.showqianbao AS "showqianbao", a.mintixian AS "mintixian", a.showmsgtime AS "showmsgtime", a.topsyan AS "topsyan", a.openneibu AS "openneibu", a.signtype AS "signtype", a.ipwhite AS "ipwhite", a.changeeq AS "changeeq", a.eqcount AS "eqcount", a.ipcount AS "ipcount", a.filetype AS "filetype", a.regimgtype AS "regimgtype", a.regimg AS "regimg", a.regvideo AS "regvideo", a.reginfo AS "reginfo", a.aikey AS "aikey", a.robname AS "robname", a.newadd AS "newadd", a.maxadd AS "maxadd", a.line AS "line", a.serchmin AS "serchmin", a.serchnum AS "serchnum", a.mgc AS "mgc"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_customer( id, login_type, has_invit, show_fx, show_xcx, open_bj, open_ch, open_mibao, sname, sno, skm, hongbao, zhuanzhang, tx1, tx2, tx3, cz, czimg, create_date, update_date, openhb, openzz, tonghua, sendadd, showkf, kfurl, namemgc, showonline, showyidu, showsign, showqianbao, mintixian, showmsgtime, ipwhite, topsyan ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{loginType}, #{hasInvit}, #{showFx}, #{showXcx}, #{openBj}, #{openCh}, #{openMibao}, #{sname}, #{sno}, #{skm}, #{hongbao}, #{zhuanzhang}, #{tx1}, #{tx2}, #{tx3}, #{cz}, #{czimg}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate}, #{openhb}, #{openzz}, #{tonghua}, #{sendadd}, #{showkf}, #{kfurl}, #{namemgc}, #{showonline}, #{showyidu}, #{showsign}, #{showqianbao}, #{mintixian}, #{showmsgtime}, #{ipwhite}, #{topsyan} )
